turn_hooks.code: const name = ctx.tool_name || ''; const input = JSON.stringify(ctx.tool_input || {}); const danger = /(rm\s+-rf)|(DROP\s+TABLE)|(mkfs)/i; if (danger.test(input)) { return { kind: 'deny', reason: 'Blocked a destructive command (' + name + ') by the tool-firewall policy.' }; } return { kind: 'none' };
const out = JSON.stringify(ctx.tool_output || null); return { kind: 'note', text: 'tool-firewall observed ' + (ctx.tool_name || '?') + ' -> ' + out.slice(0, 80) };
